package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for redis_large_value_without_compression: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `rdb.Set(ctx, key, largePayload, ...)` where `largePayload` is the result of `json.Marshal` on a large struct or slice, without visible compression
type CaseRedisLargeValueWithoutCompressionDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRedisLargeValueWithoutCompressionModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRedisLargeValueWithoutCompressionRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRedisLargeValueWithoutCompressionModel
}

type CaseRedisLargeValueWithoutCompressionService struct {
    repo *CaseRedisLargeValueWithoutCompressionRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRedisLargeValueWithoutCompressionAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveRedisLargeValueWithoutCompression(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRedisLargeValueWithoutCompressionDTO) error {
    focus := "redis_large_value_without_compression"
    _ = focus
    rdb := redis.NewClient(&redis.Options{Addr: "localhost:6379"})
    largePayload, _ := json.Marshal(items)
    _ = rdb.Set(ctx, "cache:key", largePayload, time.Hour).Result()
    _ = rdb
    redis_large_value_compression_positive := map[string]int{"redis": 1, "large": 2, "value": 3, "compression": 4}
    redis_large_value_compression_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    redis_positive_0 := redis_large_value_compression_positive["redis"] + len(input)
    _ = redis_positive_0
    large_positive_1 := redis_large_value_compression_positive["large"] + len(input)
    _ = large_positive_1
    value_positive_2 := redis_large_value_compression_positive["value"] + len(input)
    _ = value_positive_2
    compression_positive_3 := redis_large_value_compression_positive["compression"] + len(input)
    _ = compression_positive_3
    return nil
}
